subject: refactor(ui): replace hardcoded hex colors and inline styles with DaisyUI theme tokens and Tailwind utilities
body:
Debug pill severity/source colors were hardcoded hex that didn't adapt to light/dark theme.
Inline styles on several components duplicated what Tailwind classes already provide.
Centralizing color mappings in themeColors.ts follows the established STALENESS_COLOR_KEYS pattern.

- Add DEBUG_SEVERITY_COLOR_KEYS and DEBUG_SOURCE_COLOR_KEYS to themeColors.ts
- Remove SEVERITY_COLORS, SOURCE_COLORS hardcoded maps from DebugPill.tsx
- Remove duplicate levelColor map from PwaDiagnosticsTab
- Convert FuelMapWeb no-token fallback to View/Text with Tailwind classes
- Replace InstallInstructionsModal inline maxHeight with max-h-[40vh] className
- Replace LocationSearch inline minHeight/justifyContent with className
- Remove unused useWindowDimensions import from InstallInstructionsModal

Tags: refactor, ui, tailwind, daisyui, theme, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-integration
Semver: patch
